summary: Iteration 227 — Commesse Normative (Rami Normativi + Emissioni Documentali) Testing Complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified. Hierarchical model Commessa Madre → Ramo Normativo → Emissione Documentale fully functional.

issues: Minor: HTML nesting warning in console (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) from React dev tools overlay - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Created test session: test_session_rami_normativi_227. Used existing commessa: com_e8c4810ad476 (NF-2026-000001, EN_13241). Created EN_1090 and GENERICA branches with multiple emissions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commesse Normative feature fully working. Key data-testids: card-rami-normativi, btn-nuovo-ramo, dialog-nuovo-ramo, select-normativa-ramo, btn-conferma-ramo, ramo-{normativa}, btn-nuova-emissione-{normativa}, dialog-nuova-emissione, input-desc-emissione, btn-conferma-emissione, emissione-{codice}, btn-gate-{codice}. Test session: test_session_rami_normativi_227. Commessa: com_e8c4810ad476 has 2 branches (EN_1090 with 6 emissions, GENERICA with 3 emissions).

GET_commesse_normative_list.details: GET /api/commesse-normative/{commessa_id} returns list of branches including legacy wrap

POST_commesse_normative_create.details: POST /api/commesse-normative/{commessa_id} creates manual branch, idempotent behavior verified

GET_commesse_normative_detail.details: GET /api/commesse-normative/{commessa_id}/{ramo_id} returns branch detail with emissions

POST_emissioni_create.details: POST /api/emissioni/{ramo_id} creates emission with progressive numbering (D01, D02 for EN_1090, L01 for GENERICA)

GET_emissioni_gate.details: GET /api/emissioni/{ramo_id}/{emissione_id}/gate returns Evidence Gate with checks (certificati_31, riesame_tecnico, controllo_finale, wps_wpqr)

POST_emissioni_emetti_blocked_409.details: POST /api/emissioni/{ramo_id}/{emissione_id}/emetti returns 409 when gate NOT OK

GET_commesse_gerarchia.details: GET /api/commesse/{commessa_id}/gerarchia returns aggregated view with branches and nested emissions

POST_materializza_legacy.details: POST /api/commesse-normative/{commessa_id}/materializza-legacy converts legacy to real branch

unique_index_enforcement.details: Cannot create 2 branches with same normativa for same commessa (idempotent behavior)

frontend_card_rami_normativi.details: Rami Normativi card visible with data-testid='card-rami-normativi'

frontend_dialog_nuovo_ramo.details: Dialog for creating new branch opens with select normativa dropdown

frontend_dialog_nuova_emissione.details: Dialog for creating new emission opens with description input

frontend_evidence_gate_display.details: Evidence Gate button shows check results with blocking reasons

frontend_emission_list.details: Emissions displayed with code, status (Bloccata/Bozza), and description
